CustomField.formula: IF( ISPICKVAL(leaseworks__Re_Delivery_Condition_Status__c, 'Red'), IMAGE( "/resource/" + $Setup.leaseworks__LeaseWorksSettings__c.leaseworks__Package_Prefix__c + "RedeliveryStatusImages/Red.png", "Red", 18, 18 ), IF( ISPICKVAL(leaseworks__Re_Delivery_Condition_Status__c, 'Green'), IMAGE( "/resource/" + $Setup.leaseworks__LeaseWorksSettings__c.leaseworks__Package_Prefix__c + "RedeliveryStatusImages/Green.png", "Green", 18, 18 ), IF( ISPICKVAL(leaseworks__Re_Delivery_Condition_Status__c, 'Orange'), IMAGE( "/resource/" + $Setup.leaseworks__LeaseWorksSettings__c.leaseworks__Package_Prefix__c + "RedeliveryStatusImages/Orange.png", "Orange", 18, 18 ), '' ) ) )
CustomField.label: Re-Delivery Status
